column1: # /Data Sort — sort a range by a primary key column.
# Flow: /DS opens the sort menu (sticky — leaves return to it).
#   D <POINT data-range> ~      sets the data range
#   P <POINT key-cell> ~ A      sets the primary key column + Ascending
# Seed four rows of (id, name, value); sort by id ascending.
# Open /DS — Sort menu is now sticky; leaves return to it.
# Sticky: back at the Sort menu.
# P = Primary-Key → POINT A1 (any cell in the key column) → Enter.
# Rows now sorted by column A ascending: 1, 2, 3, 4.
